action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline accuracy 0.6808 with ResNet50 (5 epochs), noisy val acc ~0.53, training ~4min. Curves show loss decreasing steadily but plateauing somewhat. Analysis: Pretrained model handles noise reasonably; convnext_tiny is stronger (in22k pretrain), label smoothing helps with noisy labels, cosine LR scheduler prevents overfitting to noise, more epochs (15) should improve without exceeding budgets. Decision: Update to timm convnext_tiny, AdamW+label_smoothing=0.1+CosineAnnealingLR, train 15 epochs, submit_eval to get improved test accuracy and confirm pipeline.
